source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
fa-ri'-da (Phareida, A, Pharida; King James Version Pharira): The clan name of one of the families of "the servants of Solomon" who came up from Babylon with Zerubbabel (1 Esdras 5:33) = "Peruda" of Ezr 2:55 = "Perida" of Ne 7:57.

�
